# 404DAMNED

> 404DAMNED is a digital agency based in Amsterdam focused on high-performance web development, creative web design, and AI-driven digital experiences.

We build modern websites, e-commerce platforms, and custom digital products using Next.js, React, WordPress, and headless architecture.

## What we do
- High-end website design & development
- Next.js & React applications
- WordPress & WooCommerce development
- E-commerce performance optimization
- AI-integrated web experiences
- UI/UX design systems
- Conversion-focused landing pages

## Who we serve
- Startups
- E-commerce brands
- SaaS companies
- Creative agencies
- Businesses looking for a premium digital presence

## Core expertise
Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, WordPress, WooCommerce, REST APIs, headless CMS, performance optimization, SEO, AI integration

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.404damned.com/): Overview of services, process, and pricing
- [Work](https://www.404damned.com/work): Case studies and selected client projects
- [Insights](https://www.404damned.com/insights): Articles on web performance, e-commerce, and AI automation
- [Services](https://www.404damned.com/#services): What we offer
- [Contact](https://www.404damned.com/#contact): Get in touch

## Contact
- Email: info@404damned.com
